heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered showers near and south of Route 4; chance of drizzle, sprinkles, and fog to the north. Highs from the upper 50s to mid 60s in the south, and upper 40s to mid 50s north, except low to mid 40s northeast, and in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Winds 5 to 10 mph, from the north to northeast in northern areas, and from the south in southern sections.

heading: Tonight
text: Showers likely; an early thunderstorm possible south; freezing rain possible near the international border. Lows from the mid 40s to mid 50s in the south, and mid 30s to mid 40s north, with some lower 30s far north. Winds 5 to 10 mph, from the north in northern areas, and from the southwest in southern areas.

heading: Wednesday
text: Scattered showers early; some freezing rain possible far north; then a chance of sprinkles or periods of drizzle. Highs in the 40s to around 50 north, and 50s to around 60 in the south. Winds around 10 mph, from the northwest, or becoming so.
